examples.en: A strong earthquake shook the whole city last night.
examples.zh: 昨晚一場強烈地震撼動了整座城市。

examples.en: We hid under the table during the earthquake.
examples.zh: 地震時我們躲在桌子底下。

examples.en: The typhoon brought heavy rain and strong winds.
examples.zh: 颱風帶來了豪雨和強風。

examples.en: Schools were closed because of the typhoon.
examples.zh: 因為颱風,學校停課了。

img: spiral storm satellite bent palm trees

examples.en: The flood covered the streets with muddy water.
examples.zh: 洪水讓街道淹滿泥水。

examples.en: Many people lost their homes in the flood.
examples.zh: 許多人在洪水中失去了家園。

examples.en: The landslide blocked the mountain road.
examples.zh: 土石流阻斷了山路。

examples.en: Heavy rain often causes a landslide.
examples.zh: 豪雨常常造成山崩。

examples.en: The earthquake triggered a huge tsunami.
examples.zh: 地震引發了巨大的海嘯。

examples.en: People ran to high ground before the tsunami hit.
examples.zh: 海嘯來襲前人們跑向高處。

examples.en: A fire broke out in the old building.
examples.zh: 那棟舊大樓發生了火災。

examples.en: Never play with fire at home.
examples.zh: 在家絕對不要玩火。

examples.en: Thick smoke filled the whole room.
examples.zh: 濃煙充滿了整個房間。

examples.en: Cover your nose when there is smoke.
examples.zh: 有煙的時候要摀住鼻子。

examples.en: The flames spread very quickly.
examples.zh: 火焰蔓延得非常快。

examples.en: Firefighters fought the flames all night.
examples.zh: 消防員徹夜與火焰搏鬥。

examples.en: The team came to rescue the trapped workers.
examples.zh: 救援隊來拯救受困的工人。

examples.en: The rescue took several hours.
examples.zh: 這場救援花了好幾個小時。

examples.en: The police told everyone to evacuate the area.
examples.zh: 警察要求所有人撤離該區。

examples.en: We had to evacuate before the storm came.
examples.zh: 暴風來臨前我們必須撤離。

examples.en: The family stayed in an emergency shelter.
examples.zh: 這家人待在緊急避難所裡。

examples.en: Please find shelter during the typhoon.
examples.zh: 颱風期間請尋找避難處。

examples.en: Call 119 in an emergency.
examples.zh: 遇到緊急情況請打119。

examples.en: Stay calm during an emergency.
examples.zh: 緊急時要保持冷靜。

examples.en: The flood was a terrible disaster.
examples.zh: 那場洪水是可怕的災難。

examples.en: The country is preparing for natural disasters.
examples.zh: 這個國家正在為天災做準備。

examples.en: Rescuers found a survivor under the building.
examples.zh: 救援人員在大樓底下找到一名生還者。

examples.en: The survivors received food and water.
examples.zh: 生還者得到了食物和水。

examples.en: The earthquake victims need our help.
examples.zh: 地震受害者需要我們的幫助。

examples.en: Volunteers brought supplies to the victims.
examples.zh: 志工把物資帶給受害者。

examples.en: The injured man was taken to the hospital.
examples.zh: 受傷的男子被送往醫院。

examples.en: Several people were injured in the fire.
examples.zh: 有幾個人在火災中受傷。

examples.en: The nurse cleaned the wound carefully.
examples.zh: 護士小心地清理傷口。

examples.en: Press on the wound to stop the bleeding.
examples.zh: 壓住傷口以止血。

examples.en: His hand started to bleed after the cut.
examples.zh: 割傷後他的手開始流血。

examples.en: Keep pressing so it won't bleed too much.
examples.zh: 持續壓住,才不會流太多血。

examples.en: She put a bandage on the wound.
examples.zh: 她在傷口上綁了繃帶。

examples.en: There are bandages in the first aid kit.
examples.zh: 急救箱裡有繃帶。

examples.en: The ambulance arrived in five minutes.
examples.zh: 救護車在五分鐘內抵達。

examples.en: Please call an ambulance right now.
examples.zh: 請馬上叫救護車。

examples.en: The firefighter carried the child to safety.
examples.zh: 消防員把孩子抱到安全的地方。

examples.en: Firefighters are brave and strong.
examples.zh: 消防員既勇敢又強壯。

examples.en: Wear a helmet to protect your head.
examples.zh: 戴上安全帽保護你的頭。

examples.en: The rescue worker put on his helmet.
examples.zh: 救援人員戴上了他的頭盔。

examples.en: We heard the siren of a fire truck.
examples.zh: 我們聽到消防車的警笛聲。

examples.en: The siren warned people to take cover.
examples.zh: 警報聲警告人們躲避。

examples.en: The government sent a flood warning.
examples.zh: 政府發出了洪水警報。

examples.en: Please listen to the warning on the radio.
examples.zh: 請注意收音機上的警報。

examples.en: The people were in great danger.
examples.zh: 那些人身處極大的危險中。

examples.en: Stay away from danger during a storm.
examples.zh: 暴風期間要遠離危險。

examples.en: The old bridge collapsed in the earthquake.
examples.zh: 舊橋在地震中倒塌了。

examples.en: The roof may collapse at any time.
examples.zh: 屋頂隨時可能倒塌。

examples.en: Two people were trapped inside the car.
examples.zh: 有兩個人被困在車裡。

examples.en: The dog was trapped under the fallen wall.
examples.zh: 那隻狗被困在倒塌的牆下。

examples.en: They escaped from the burning house.
examples.zh: 他們從失火的房子逃了出來。

examples.en: Know how to escape before a fire happens.
examples.zh: 火災發生前要知道如何逃生。

examples.en: The teacher led the students to safety.
examples.zh: 老師帶學生到安全的地方。

examples.en: Safety comes first in an emergency.
examples.zh: 緊急時安全最重要。

examples.en: Cover your head to protect yourself.
examples.zh: 摀住頭部保護自己。

examples.en: A helmet can protect you from falling objects.
examples.zh: 安全帽能保護你免受掉落物傷害。

examples.en: He survived the terrible flood.
examples.zh: 他在可怕的洪水中生還。

examples.en: They survived three days without food.
examples.zh: 他們三天沒有食物仍存活下來。

examples.en: We felt a strong aftershock an hour later.
examples.zh: 一小時後我們感受到強烈的餘震。

examples.en: Be careful of aftershocks after an earthquake.
examples.zh: 地震後要小心餘震。

examples.en: Keep a flashlight ready for a blackout.
examples.zh: 準備好手電筒以備停電。

examples.en: She used a flashlight to find the exit.
examples.zh: 她用手電筒找到了出口。

examples.en: We stored food and water as supplies.
examples.zh: 我們儲備了食物和水當作物資。

examples.en: Emergency supplies were sent to the town.
examples.zh: 緊急物資被送往那個城鎮。

examples.en: She learned first aid at school.
examples.zh: 她在學校學了急救。

examples.en: First aid can save a person's life.
examples.zh: 急救能救人一命。

img: first aid kit red cross box

examples.en: The storm victimized many poor families.
examples.zh: 那場暴風使許多貧困家庭受害。

examples.en: Disasters often victimize the weak.
examples.zh: 災難常使弱者受害。

examples.en: The typhoon caused a lot of damage.
examples.zh: 颱風造成了很多損害。

examples.en: They checked the damage after the flood.
examples.zh: 洪水過後他們檢查了損害。

examples.en: A wildfire burned the whole forest.
examples.zh: 一場野火燒毀了整片森林。

examples.en: Firefighters worked hard to stop the wildfire.
examples.zh: 消防員努力撲滅野火。

examples.en: Use the extinguisher to put out the fire.
examples.zh: 用滅火器把火撲滅。

examples.en: Every home should have a fire extinguisher.
examples.zh: 每個家庭都應該有滅火器。

examples.en: The fire alarm rang loudly.
examples.zh: 火災警報器大聲響起。

examples.en: When the alarm goes off, leave at once.
examples.zh: 警報一響,立刻離開。

examples.en: Try not to panic during an earthquake.
examples.zh: 地震時盡量不要驚慌。

examples.en: The crowd began to panic when the lights went out.
examples.zh: 燈光熄滅時人群開始驚慌。

examples.en: There was a big crack in the wall.
examples.zh: 牆上有一道大裂縫。

examples.en: The ground cracked open during the quake.
examples.zh: 地震時地面裂了開來。

img: large crack in wall or ground

examples.en: The whole house began to shake.
examples.zh: 整棟房子開始搖晃。

examples.en: The ground shook for ten seconds.
examples.zh: 地面搖晃了十秒鐘。

examples.en: The radio warned us about the coming typhoon.
examples.zh: 收音機警告我們颱風即將來臨。

examples.en: He warned everyone to leave the beach.
examples.zh: 他警告大家離開海灘。

examples.en: The storm caused a power outage all night.
examples.zh: 暴風造成整夜停電。

examples.en: We used candles during the power outage.
examples.zh: 停電時我們點蠟燭。

examples.en: The hurricane destroyed many houses.
examples.zh: 颶風摧毀了許多房屋。

examples.en: People boarded up windows before the hurricane.
examples.zh: 颶風來前人們用木板封住窗戶。

examples.en: The long drought dried up the river.
examples.zh: 長期乾旱使河流乾涸。

examples.en: Farmers suffered during the drought.
examples.zh: 乾旱期間農民受苦。

examples.en: They carried the patient on a stretcher.
examples.zh: 他們用擔架抬著病人。

examples.en: The injured man was placed on a stretcher.
examples.zh: 受傷的男子被放上擔架。

examples.en: Many volunteers helped clean up the town.
examples.zh: 許多志工幫忙清理城鎮。

examples.en: She became a volunteer after the disaster.
examples.zh: 災難之後她成為一名志工。

examples.en: The town slowly recovered after the flood.
examples.zh: 洪水過後,這個城鎮慢慢復原。

examples.en: It takes time to recover from a disaster.
examples.zh: 從災難中復原需要時間。
